title: Remove comment history section above documents

requirements.text: Remove the CommentHistorySection component that appears directly above the DocumentsSection in the CaseDetail page

quotes: remove the comment history section that does appear when you click the history icon i.e only the one directly above the documents section

acceptanceCriteria: The CommentHistorySection component is no longer rendered in the CaseDetail page layout
The DocumentsSection remains visible and functional
The activity timeline with history icon functionality remains intact and unaffected

constraints: Do not remove the ActivityTimeline component or the history icon functionality
nonGoals: Changing the history icon click behavior
